author: JohnnieLZ
summary: Primary claim factually wrong: cmd_plan_resolve is ~100 lines (not 242) with max 5 nesting levels (not 31), at lines 486-585 (not 437-680). Secondary claim overstated: 8 file collector functions share a common signature but each has unique data-extraction logic — not 'nearly identical' and not reducible to 30 lines.
